mapper.insert: INSERT INTO applications (user_id, job_id, resume_id, status, applied_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{jobId}, #{resumeId}, #{status}, #{appliedAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT applications.*, jobs.title as jobTitle, resumes.name as studentName FROM applications left join Jobs on applications.job_id = Jobs.id left join resumes on applications.resume_id = resumes.id
and applications.jobTitle like concat('%', #{params.title}, '%')
and applications.studentName like concat('%', #{params.studentName}, '%')
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM applications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND job_id = #{jobId})
